# Support

Canvas Timeline is alpha software. The project currently supports community
questions and bug reports through GitHub issues.

## Where To Ask

- Use a bug report issue for reproducible package or docs failures.
- Use a feature request issue for API, package, or docs proposals.
- Use a documentation issue when examples, package pages, or guides are unclear.
- Use a performance issue for timeline rendering, interaction, or package-size
  concerns.

For suspected vulnerabilities, follow [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md) instead of
opening a public issue.
